mapper.select: SELECT empno , wu_cmm.codenm.emp(empno) AS empno_nm , photo , inp_id FROM WU_ADM.TA_PSNL_PHOTO_TEST ORDER BY empno

SELECT empno , empno_nm , dept_no , dept_no_nm , photo FROM ( SELECT a.empno , b.kor_nm AS empno_nm , b.dept_no , wu_cmm.codenm.dept(b.dept_no) AS dept_no_nm , a.photo , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY b.dept_no, a.empno) AS rn FROM wu_adm.ta_psnl_photo_test a LEFT JOIN emp_mstr b ON a.empno = b.empno WHERE b.sclpst_sttus_cd IN ('3050100','3050200') AND b.kor_nm IS NOT NULL AND b.dept_no IS NOT NULL AND a.photo IS NOT NULL
AND a.empno LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.kor_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY dept_no, empno

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wu_adm.ta_psnl_photo_test a LEFT JOIN emp_mstr b ON a.empno = b.empno WHERE b.sclpst_sttus_cd IN ('3050100','3050200') AND b.kor_nm IS NOT NULL AND b.dept_no IS NOT NULL AND a.photo IS NOT NULL
AND a.empno LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.kor_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT a.empno , b.kor_nm AS empno_nm , b.dept_no , wu_cmm.codenm.dept(b.dept_no) AS dept_no_nm , a.photo FROM wu_adm.ta_psnl_photo_test a LEFT JOIN emp_mstr b ON a.empno = b.empno WHERE a.empno = #{empno}
